title: BambooMN Premium 3.5" Bamboo Mini Cocktail Tasting Forks Fruit Food Picks Party Supplies, 100 Pieces
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: SPLINTER FREE Rest assured your clients, customers, and guests will not get any splinters in their mouth from our mini cocktail forks and they will not break from picking up Hors' D'oeuvres or appetisers.

PERFECT FOR ANY SIZE FUNCTION These bamboo mini cocktail picks are perfect for any function regardless of size whether you are catering a corporate event, using at a buffet or just using them for a home party. They are the perfect utensils to use for meat and fruit trays and come in handy for mini desserts, appetisers and many other small sized culinary treats.

STYLISH AND PRACTICAL These mini tasting forks can be used to dress up burgers, sandwiches, or sliders giving them a more refined look. They are also very practical by helping hold food together. They are also great for food tastings, fruit cups, pastry, cakes, appetisers and much more.

SERVING APPETISERS OR SAMPLES is made easy with these bamboo mini forks. Simply spear a few small pieces of items such as fruit, cheese, vegetables, or meats to create fresh mini hors d'oeuvres. They are a great alternative to traditional toothpicks/frill pick giving a more professional way to serve hors d'oeuvres and any type of buffet service.

COST EFFECTIVE AND ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY! These bamboo mini tasting forks are a cost effective approach to disposable cutlery and are completely biodegradable because they are made entirely from bamboo. Feel free to toss them out with your food waste or into your compost.
description: Product Description These BambooMN brand premium mini cocktail forks are 3.5” inches long and are splinter free. They are the perfect substitute for plastic tasting forks and are completely recyclab;e since they are made 100% from sustainable bamboo material. PERFECT FOR ANY SIZE FUNCTION These bamboo mini cocktail picks are perfect for any function whether you are catering a coperate event, using at a buffet or just using them for a home party. They are perfect to use on meat, cheese and fruit platters and come in handy for mini desserts, appetizers and other small sized culinary treats. STYLISH AND PRACTICAL These mini tasting forks can be used to dress up burgers, sandwiches, or sliders giving them a more refined look. They are also very practical by helping hold food together. They are also great for food tastings, fruit cups, pastry, cakes, appetizers and much more. COST EFFECTIVE AND SAFE These bamboo mini tasting forks are a cost effective approach to disposable cutlery and are completely recyclable because they are made entirely from bamboo. Feel free to toss them out with your food waste or into your compost. ALL SORTS OF DECORATIVE PICKS BambooMN strives to bring different kinds and length of decorative bamboo cocktails hors d'eourves picks so you can get them all in one setting. Check out a few below to see if they also suits your needs.
